changes_summary: 5 improvements—confirmation email, 0% ring, cold-start retry, mobile orientation, timer cleanup

files_changed.description: Added: retry logic, 0% ring fix, timer hide, canvas orientation, email call
Added v23 entry with full documentation
New function: zero-delay confirmation email on quiz completion

commit_message:
v23: 5 improvements—confirmation email, 0% ring, cold-start retry, mobile orientation, timer cleanup

- Add send-immediate-email.js: zero-delay personalized welcome email
- Enforce 5% minimum display for zero-score ring
- Implement automatic retry for submit-lead on cold-start
- Enhance canvas resize: orientationchange + debounce
- Hide quiz countdown timer when results render

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
github_actions_will: Deploy to Netlify using NETLIFY_SITE_ID + NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN
Create GitHub commit comment with deployment status
next_step: Push to main branch → GitHub Actions auto-deploys → Netlify live in 2-3 minutes
rollback_procedure: Revert commit on GitHub → GitHub Actions runs again → previous version deployed
post_deploy_verification: Test critical user flows (e.g., quiz completion, email sending)
